name: my-marketplace
description: Local marketplace — personal overlay on the AIDD framework

plugins.name: aidd-overlay
plugins.description: Extends the AIDD framework: dig, harvest, reconcile-normative, data-optimize, web-optimize, status. Alias: rechallenge, afterdev, endtask, endplan, bump-plugin, previously, smarten, skillconf, aiddlegacy.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Mobile-first responsive design system: from-reference / from-brief intakes (core trio first, never emoji), agnostic W3C tokens + CSS/Tailwind adapters, living HTML wireframes, reusable components with options, compliance audit, plus diagnose + refactor for production codebases and export-wordpress.

plugins.name: doc-writer
plugins.description: Professional documentation authoring: user-guide (end-user manuals), technical-document (developer/architecture/API docs), and specification (cahier des charges — requirements documents).

plugins.name: rpg-writer
plugins.description: Narrative writing skills and workflows (novels, TTRPG scenarios, guides): concept, TOC, chapters, tone, lore, review.

plugins.name: sc-php
plugins.description: PHP ecosystem skills: Laravel/Symfony/WordPress perf pivots, HTMX hybrid, Eloquent + Doctrine data pivots.

plugins.name: sc-js
plugins.description: JavaScript ecosystem: sniff (Nuxt/Vue/SvelteKit/Alpine/Vite/Astro), audit, improve (8 capability pivots in Step 1.5), legacy (Vue 2→3/ESM/TS), teach + SvelteKit perf pivot + Svelte stores pivot + Biome pivot + Prisma/Drizzle/TypeORM/Mongoose/GraphQL/tRPC data pivots.

plugins.name: sc-tiers
plugins.description: Third-party SaaS consumption rules: Firebase coding + Firebase/Supabase/DynamoDB/Hasura data pivots.

plugins.name: sc-python
plugins.description: Python ecosystem: two-tier sniff (pivot model), audit, improve, legacy, teach. Perf pivots: Django, DRF, Celery, FastAPI, httpx, Flask (gap). Data pivots: Django ORM, SQLAlchemy, HuggingFace datasets. Capability pivots: Python idioms, spaCy NLP.

plugins.name: sc-rust
plugins.description: Rust ecosystem: two-tier sniff (pivot model), audit, Axum/Actix-web perf pivots + SQLx/Diesel data pivots.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Personal Obsidian notes management — Pro project lifecycle, email triage (mail), and solo TTRPG vault tooling: player-character management (pc) and scenario writing / campaign preparation (rpg). Live play moved to the hermes plugin.

plugins.name: hermes
plugins.description: Plugin sous contrat d'architecture Hermes Agent (Nous Research) : boucle de conversation + dispatch d'outils, mémoire persistante, prompt à trois tiers (stable/context/volatile). Skill : solo-mc (maître de jeu JDR solo en direct).
